title: Institute for Advanced Judaic Studies - Canada.ca
content:
## Institute for Advanced Judaic Studies
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Talmudic Law
- Master of Talmudic Law
- Doctor of Philosophy in Judaics
- Doctor of Philosophy in Talmudic Law
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
